% PCT Specification — Pandoc LaTeX Template
% Based on the default Pandoc template with custom styling
\documentclass[11pt,a4paper]{article}

% ── Fonts & Encoding ─────────────────────────────────────────────
\usepackage[T1]{fontenc}
\usepackage[utf8]{inputenc}
\usepackage{lmodern}
\usepackage{inconsolata}          % nicer monospace font

% ── Page Geometry ────────────────────────────────────────────────
\usepackage[
  top=1.2in,
  bottom=1.2in,
  left=1.25in,
  right=1.25in
]{geometry}

% ── Colours ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
\usepackage[dvipsnames,svgnames]{xcolor}
\definecolor{pctnavy}{HTML}{1A2744}
\definecolor{pctgold}{HTML}{D4A742}
\definecolor{pctblue}{HTML}{1A2744}       % alias for headings
\definecolor{pctaccent}{HTML}{D4A742}     % accent = brand gold
\definecolor{pctgray}{HTML}{4A4A4A}
\definecolor{codebg}{HTML}{F5F5F5}
\definecolor{rulecolor}{HTML}{CCCCCC}

% ── Typography ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
\usepackage{microtype}
\usepackage{etoolbox}             % for \pretocmd
\usepackage{parskip}              % space between paragraphs, no indent
\setlength{\parskip}{0.5em}

% ── Headers & Footers ───────────────────────────────────────────
\usepackage{fancyhdr}
\pagestyle{fancy}
\fancyhf{}
\fancyhead[L]{\small\color{pctgray}\textit{Privacy Claims Token — Open Specification}}
\fancyhead[R]{\small\color{pctgray}$if(version)$$version$$else$v0.1$endif$}
\fancyfoot[L]{\footnotesize\color{pctgray}\textcopyright\ 2026 DPG Labs. CC BY 4.0}
\fancyfoot[C]{\small\color{pctgray}\thepage}
\renewcommand{\headrulewidth}{0.4pt}
\renewcommand{\headrule}{\hbox to\headwidth{\color{pctgold}\leaders\hrule height \headrulewidth\hfill}}
\renewcommand{\footrulewidth}{0pt}

% ── Section Styling ──────────────────────────────────────────────
\usepackage{titlesec}

\setcounter{secnumdepth}{0}       % headings already have manual numbers

\titleformat{\section}
  {\Large\bfseries\color{pctblue}}
  {}{0pt}{}
  [\vspace{-0.4em}{\color{pctaccent}\rule{\textwidth}{0.8pt}}]

% Force a page break before every \section (after titlesec has redefined it)
\pretocmd{\section}{\clearpage}{}{}

\titleformat{\subsection}
  {\large\bfseries\color{pctblue}}
  {}{0pt}{}

\titleformat{\subsubsection}
  {\normalsize\bfseries\color{pctblue}}
  {}{0pt}{}

\titlespacing*{\section}{0pt}{1.5em}{0.6em}
\titlespacing*{\subsection}{0pt}{1.2em}{0.4em}
\titlespacing*{\subsubsection}{0pt}{1em}{0.3em}

% ── Code Blocks ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
\usepackage{fancyvrb}           % required by Pandoc highlighting macros
\usepackage{framed}
\usepackage{listings}

% Pandoc injects Shaded/Highlighting environments + token commands via this variable
\definecolor{shadecolor}{HTML}{F5F5F5}
$highlighting-macros$
% Fallback: ensure Shaded environment exists even if highlighting macros omit it
\makeatletter
\@ifundefined{Shaded}{%
  \newenvironment{Shaded}{\begin{snugshade}}{\end{snugshade}}%
}{}
\makeatother
\lstset{
  basicstyle=\small\ttfamily\color{pctgray},
  backgroundcolor=\color{codebg},
  frame=single,
  rulecolor=\color{rulecolor},
  framesep=6pt,
  xleftmargin=6pt,
  xrightmargin=6pt,
  breaklines=true,
  breakatwhitespace=false,
  tabsize=2,
  showstringspaces=false,
  captionpos=b,
  aboveskip=1em,
  belowskip=1em,
}

% ── Tables ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
\usepackage{booktabs}
\usepackage{longtable}
\usepackage{array}
\usepackage{colortbl}         % \rowcolor, \arrayrulecolor
\usepackage{calc}             % needed by Pandoc for \real in column widths
\newcounter{none}             % Pandoc sets \LTcaptype{none} to suppress table numbering
\renewcommand{\arraystretch}{1.4}

% ── Links ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
\usepackage[
  colorlinks=true,
  linkcolor=pctblue,
  urlcolor=pctaccent,
  citecolor=pctblue,
  bookmarks=true,
  bookmarksnumbered=false,
  pdfstartview=FitH
]{hyperref}

% ── Lists ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
\usepackage{enumitem}
\setlist{nosep, leftmargin=1.5em}

% Pandoc emits \tightlist for compact lists
\providecommand{\tightlist}{\setlength{\itemsep}{0pt}\setlength{\parskip}{0pt}}
\setlist[itemize,1]{label={\color{pctaccent}\textbullet}}
\setlist[itemize,2]{label={\color{pctaccent}--}}

% ── Graphics (for potential future use) ──────────────────────────
\usepackage{graphicx}

% ── PDF Metadata ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
\hypersetup{
  pdftitle={Privacy Claims Token (PCT) — Open Specification},
  pdfauthor={DPG Labs · The DPG},
  pdfsubject={PCT Specification $if(version)$$version$$else$v0.1$endif$},
  pdfkeywords={privacy, data governance, JWT, claims token, specification}
}

% ── Title Page ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
$if(title)$
\title{}  % suppress default title
$endif$

\begin{document}

% ── Custom Title Page ────────────────────────────────────────────
\thispagestyle{empty}
\begin{center}
  \vspace*{1cm}

  % Logo — place logo.png in .github/spec-pdf/ to enable
  \IfFileExists{logo.png}{%
    \includegraphics[width=2.5cm]{logo.png}\\[1cm]
  }{%
    \vspace{1cm}
  }

  {\color{pctgold}\rule{\textwidth}{1.5pt}}

  \vspace{1.2cm}

  {\Huge\bfseries\color{pctnavy} Privacy Claims Token (PCT)}

  \vspace{0.5cm}

  {\LARGE\color{pctgray} Open Specification}

  \vspace{1cm}

  {\large\color{pctgold}\bfseries $if(version)$$version$$else$Version 0.1$endif$ · Draft for Public Comment}

  \vspace{0.8cm}

  {\normalsize\color{pctgray} $if(date)$$date$$else$March 2026$endif$}

  \vspace{1.2cm}

  {\color{pctgold}\rule{\textwidth}{1.5pt}}

  \vspace{2cm}

  {\normalsize\color{pctnavy}
    \textbf{DPG Labs} · The DPG\\[0.3em]
    \href{https://dpglabs.io}{\color{pctgold}dpglabs.io}
  }

  \vspace{1.5cm}

  {\small\color{pctgray}\textit{%
    Released under the Creative Commons Attribution 4.0\\
    International Licence (CC BY 4.0)
  }}

\end{center}

\newpage
\setcounter{page}{1}

% ── Body ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
$body$

\end{document}
